name: AG Digitalz AI Receptionist
goal: Track AG Digitalz AI Receptionist as a separate product build project, not AG OS core.
knownFacts: This is a product project, not AG OS core.
The project is currently building under GitHub workflow.
No live services are connected unless repository records show otherwise.
scope: Register production-clean project metadata in AG OS.
Keep AI Receptionist separate from AG OS core.
Track current build posture using known repository metadata only.
outOfScope: Do not treat AI Receptionist as AG OS core.
Do not connect live services from AG OS.
Do not use production or customer data.
Do not infer live service status beyond known records.

risks.risk: AI Receptionist is a separate product project and could be confused with AG OS core work.
risks.mitigation: Keep its record marked as product_project and require separate approval for live service, deployment, credential, or production-data work.

qualityGates: No live service connection is added.
No credentials or production data are stored.
Future product work uses the product repository and a separate scoped PR.
securityReview: Production-clean registry metadata only. No credentials, live endpoints, private configuration, production exports, or customer data are recorded.
costTracking: No paid actions authorized. Future paid work requires Cost OS approval.
deploymentPlan: No deployment from AG OS. Any deployment requires future owner-approved scope and rollback planning.
